description_long: This house is a two-story residential building with a steeply pitched gable roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is surrounded by mature deciduous trees and dense shrubbery, providing a sense of privacy and integration with nature. Large windows line the longer sides of the house, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory is attached to one side, featuring a transparent roof and walls. The main entryway is partially obscured by foliage but appears to be centrally located, with a small porch or stoop. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines and a focus on natural surroundings.
description: A two-story gable-roofed house surrounded by trees and shrubs, featuring large windows and a glass sunroom. The design combines traditional and modern elements with a focus on natural integration.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, with the glass sunroom and dense tree canopy dominating the view.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and a triangular gable roof framed by tall trees.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the house is shown, highlighting a long row of windows and the extensive tree coverage along the perimeter.
description_view_3: The rear of the house is visible, with the glass sunroom and a fenced area, as well as the gable roof and surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small porch, partially obscured by shrubs and trees, featuring a simple door and minimal decorative elements.
